title: gdal bug fix and enhancement update
overview: An update for Oracle Linux is now available for Oracle Linux 10.
description:
[3.10.3-3]
- Rebuilt for Python 3.14

[3.10.3-2]
- Fix *.py scripts packaging

[3.10.3-1]
- Update to 3.10.3

[3.10.2-5]
- Enable blosc

[3.10.2-4]
- Rebuild (poppler)

[3.10.2-3]
- Add definitions of missing int16_t and int32_t

[3.10.2-2]
- Rebuild for libarrow 19 in poppler's sidetag

[3.10.2-1]
- Update to 3.10.2

[3.10.1-4]
- Rebuilt for libarrow 19

[3.10.1-3]
- Rebuild (poppler)
